query_result.reasoning: Now let me also get the segment breakdown to understand what segments exist beyond Connectivity, and to get more context on the revenue concentration.

tool_calls.name: retrieve_information
tool_calls.args: {"prompt": "What are all the operating segments and their revenues for Q1 2026 and FY2025 in {{spacex_s1}}? Show the full segment revenue breakdown."}

parsed_args.prompt: What are all the operating segments and their revenues for Q1 2026 and FY2025 in {{spacex_s1}}? Show the full segment revenue breakdown.

tool_call.name: retrieve_information
tool_call.args: {"prompt": "What are all the operating segments and their revenues for Q1 2026 and FY2025 in {{spacex_s1}}? Show the full segment revenue breakdown."}

parsed_args.prompt: What are all the operating segments and their revenues for Q1 2026 and FY2025 in {{spacex_s1}}? Show the full segment revenue breakdown.

tool_output.output:
The company has three reportable operating segments: **Space**, **Connectivity**, and **AI**. Below is the full revenue breakdown for the first quarter of 2026 and the fiscal year 2025.

### Q1 2026 (Three Months Ended March 31, 2026)

| Segment / Type | Revenue ($ millions) |
|----------------|----------------------|
| **Space** | **619** |
|     Launch Services | 330 |
|     Launch & Development | 289 |
| **Connectivity** | **3,257** |
|     Consumer | 2,148 |
|     Enterprise & Government | 1,109 |
| **AI** | **818** |
|     Advertising | 343 |
|     AI Solutions & Infrastructure | 475 |
| **Total Revenues** | **4,694** |

### FY2025 (Year Ended December 31, 2025)

| Segment / Type | Revenue ($ millions) |
|----------------|----------------------|
| **Space** | **4,086** |
|     Launch Services | 2,576 |
|     Launch & Development | 1,510 |
| **Connectivity** | **11,387** |
|     Consumer | 7,208 |
|     Enterprise & Government | 4,179 |
| **AI** | **3,201** |
|     Advertising | 1,844 |
|     AI Solutions & Infrastructure | 1,357 |
| **Total Revenues** | **18,674** |

*Note: All products revenue is attributable to the Connectivity segment.*
